title: The Man-Of-War Hawk
content:
Yon black man-of-war-hawk that wheels in the light
    O'er the black ship's white sky-s'l, sunned cloud to the sight,
    Have we low-flyers wings to ascend to his height?
    No arrow can reach him; nor thought can attain
    To the placid supreme in the sweep of his reign.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Herman Melville, titled "The Man-Of-War Hawk", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
